surface: React Notice Checklist official notice record

accessibility.keyboard: Controls remain semantic buttons/inputs with visible labels; passing and statutory-blocked mutation paths are covered by App.test.tsx.
accessibility.focus: Existing focus-visible styling remains active for buttons, links, inputs, and workspace navigation.
accessibility.contrast: Official notice record uses existing green/gold/red status tokens on tinted panels with readable text contrast.
accessibility.copy_review: Success, loading, empty, error, and partial copy all state what the clerk must do before treating the meeting as lawfully noticed. Passing and statutory-blocked mutation paths are covered by App.test.tsx.
